LanguageData.XFCT_Circle.label: Circle
LanguageData.XFCT_Circle.description: The lower class provides resources and labor for the upper class, and the upper class provides high pressure governance and thought reform of the lower class. A feudal class culture that aims to keep people captive.
LanguageData.XFCT_FFF.label: FFF
LanguageData.XFCT_FFF.description: Gathering people who are persecuted by the regime and they still remain angry. Because of the acceptance of people from different backgrounds and cultures, a situation of conflict and integration is created.
LanguageData.XFCT_Heroism.label: Heroism
LanguageData.XFCT_Heroism.description: A romanticism that values individual ability and merit, but this idolatrous culture produces not just heroes, but dictators as well.
LanguageData.XFCT_Explorism.label: Explorism
LanguageData.XFCT_Explorism.description: After 5,500 years of various disasters, the surviving humans believe that the world is full of unknowns and threats, that only technology and foresight can guarantee the development of humanity.
LanguageData.XFCT_EoM.label: Eye of Maker
LanguageData.XFCT_EoM.description: Resources are inevitably concentrated in a small group of people, power turns good people into devils, and when the balance is lost, the blade of the Maker is placed on the necks of those people.
